name: autonomous-supply-chain-control-tower
description: Open-source simulator for autonomous supply chain control tower operations.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/data-gen && npm run build -w packages/simulation && npm run build -w packages/importers
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/worker && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.check: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.simulate: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w apps/worker && npm start -w apps/worker -- --once
